name: Boiled Crabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a large (10-quart) stockpot one-third full with water.
2. Add the lemons, potatoes, corn, onions, salt, and peppers to the pot.
3. Cover and bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Let boil for 10 minutes.
5. Add the crabs (or substitute other small to medium crabs) to the pot. Cover and return to boil.
6. Once steam starts to escape from under the cover, let cook for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Turn off the heat and let sit, covered, for another 10 minutes.
